```py
client = OpenAI()
request_params = {
        "model" = "gpt-5",
        "input" = messages,
        "reasoning": {"effort": "medium"}, # can be: minimal, low, medium, high
    }
client.responses.create(**request_params)
```

```py
client = OpenAI()
request_params = {
        "model" = "gpt-5",
        "input" = messages,
        "text" = {"verbosity": "medium"}, # can be: low, medium, high
    }
client.responses.create(**request_params)
```
